---
title: "Sir Frederic Rogers 8th Bt., 1st Lord Blachford"
---

## Sir Frederic Rogers 8th Bt., 1st Lord Blachford

**Dates:** (1811-1889)

### Description

landowner

### Biography

He succeeded his father as 8th baronet in 1851 and was created (1871) 1st Lord Blachford; he  married (1847) Georgiana Mary Colvile (<i>d</i>. 13 July 1900), they had no children and lived at Blachford Park, near Cornwood [ODNB]

### Letters

- [To Anna Meredith Barrett Lennard, Decr 21st 1898](../letters/3389_To_Anna_Meredith_Barrett_Lennard.html)
- Letter from Jany 10th 1861 
- Letter from Dec 1st [1854]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
